# AI Copilot Feature Design Prompt Template

Use this template for all new feature design requests to ensure requirements are clear, consistent, and optimized for rapid, low-churn implementation by AI Copilot or developers.

---

## 1. Feature Overview
Briefly describe the feature and its purpose in 2-3 sentences.

---

## 2. Business Goals
- List the main business objectives this feature should achieve.

---

## 3. User Stories
- As a [user/admin/developer], I want to [do something], so that [benefit].

---

## 4. Functional Requirements
- List the key functional requirements as clear, testable statements.
- Include any CRUD operations, user interactions, or integrations.

---

## 5. Technical Implementation Notes
- Specify any architectural, security, or technology constraints (e.g., CakePHP plugin, Stimulus controller, database changes).
- Mention any required UI/UX patterns or frameworks (e.g., Bootstrap, paginated tables).

---

## 6. Edge Cases & Error Handling
- List any important edge cases, error scenarios, or validation rules.

---

## 7. Glossary (if needed)
- Define any domain-specific terms or abbreviations used above.

---

**Instructions:**
- Copy and fill out this template for each new feature request.
- The more detail you provide, the better the requirements will be for AI Copilot to generate implementation-ready documentation and code.
- always review the current code base and docs to make sure the new requirements will match with the application best practices and patterns.
- save the requirements in /ai-requirements/[feature name]/requirements.md

---

This prompt ensures requirements are structured, unambiguous, and ready for direct use by AI Copilot or developers.
